_comment: Per-cut bilingual captions for ffmpeg burn-in. KO line shown above EN line, bottom-centered. Built 2026-05-15 by collapsing CAPTIONS_COPY_PASTE.txt (7 captions for sora-era 7-clip cut) into 5 captions for the Veo-era 5-cut episode. Dropped captions: '10살 차이 / 10 years apart' and '한 가족이에요 / Now we're family' — narrative arc still reads (intro → intro → play → bond → outro).

cut5_closer.en: See you often from now on!
